personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience in designing and building scalable data pipelines and transformation processes. Specialized in migrating legacy on-prem systems to cloud-based architectures using AWS (Glue, Athena, S3). Expert in Python, PySpark, and SQL for ETL/ELT processes, data modeling, and pipeline optimization. Proficient in ensuring data quality, reliability, and performance for analytics and reporting use cases. Experienced in data lake and data warehouse architectures with a focus on automation and continuous improvement. Strong collaborator with cross-functional teams to deliver data solutions aligned with business requirements.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest telemetry data from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing data reliability and performance.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, supporting analytics and seasonal forecasting.
Built data transformation logic and automated reporting workflows to reduce manual effort and improve efficiency.
Implemented data quality checks and validation processes using Pandas for pipeline integrity.
Collaborated with stakeholders to develop executive dashboards and consolidate disparate data feeds for reporting.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for critical systems, ensuring data reliability and performance metrics.
Led data mining initiatives to optimize user performance metrics for key systems, driving efficiency.
Supported cloud migration to AWS, integrating performance monitoring for data workflows.
Developed dashboards for end-to-end functionality and performance analysis.
Analyzed bottlenecks and provided actionable recommendations for system improvements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Designed custom data extraction scripts using Perl and Ksh to support performance monitoring and reporting.
Led large-scale implementations of CA APM, managing data flows across 4,000–6,000 agents.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot performance issues in J2EE environments, ensuring data integrity.
Created dashboards and alerts for data-driven decision-making and system optimization.
Documented processes and provided training on data handling and monitoring best practices.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, optimizing data structures for high-throughput systems.
Designed data transformation processes to maintain sub-second latency during migration.
Built automated testing frameworks to validate data integrity and pipeline performance.
Reduced hardware footprint by 95% through data optimization and schema design.
Ensured data reliability for a shopping engine handling massive transaction volumes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock to manage scalable data pipelines. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet for query automation. Resolved small file issues with Snappy and Parquet compression, optimizing ETL processes for enterprise-scale data access and analytics.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, and Streamlit to replace manual processes. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% with Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive dashboards for real-time data insights and reporting.
